TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: O Ikiris a sowal hananay i, o Sowal no Ikiris. Ira ko 'alomanay to tamdaw a Ikiris i United Kingdom. Tangasa to i 2006 a mihcaan i, ira to ko 4 'ok a tamdaw somowalay to Ikiris a sowal i hkal ma^min. Tilid no Ikiris Pilifet to fana' to sowal no Ikiris IELTS TOEFL TOEIC Tatiri'an a tilid
S.PHON: o~u ikiris a so~uwa…ĺ ńßananaj i, o~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u ikiris. ira ko~u °a…ĺo~umanaj to~u tam…¨~…ģaw a ikiris i o~u~unit…ô…¨~…ģ kiŇč…¨~…ģo~um. taŇčasa to~u i **** a mińß ¶aan i, ira to~u ko~u * °o~uk a tam…¨~…ģaw so~umo~uwa…ĺaj to~u ikiris a so~uwa…ĺ i ńßka…ĺ ma Ēmin. ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ no~u ikiris pi…ĺif…ôt to~u fana ° to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u ikiris i…ô…ĺts to~u…ôf…ĺ to~u…ôi ¶ tatiri °an a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ
S.FORM: O Ikiris a sowal hananay i, o Sowal no Ikiris. Ira ko 'alomanay to tamdaw a Ikiris i United Kingdom. Tangasa to i 2006 a mihcaan i, ira to ko 4 'ok a tamdaw somowalay to Ikiris a sowal i hkal ma^min. Tilid no Ikiris Pilifet to fana' to sowal no Ikiris IELTS TOEFL TOEIC Tatiri'an a tilid
S.PHON: o~u ikiris a so~uwa…ĺ ńßananaj i, o~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u ikiris. ira ko~u °a…ĺo~umanaj to~u tam…¨~…ģaw a ikiris i o~u~unit…ô…¨~…ģ kiŇč…¨~…ģo~um. taŇčasa to~u i **** a mińß ¶aan i, ira to~u ko~u * °o~uk a tam…¨~…ģaw so~umo~uwa…ĺaj to~u ikiris a so~uwa…ĺ i ńßka…ĺ ma Ēmin. ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ no~u ikiris pi…ĺif…ôt to~u fana ° to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u ikiris i…ô…ĺts to~u…ôf…ĺ to~u…ôi ¶ tatiri °an a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ
